title: Lot
description: Smallest land unit in the substrate's geographic hierarchy (per PRD §6.7 + §7). Country → state/province → city → district → lot. Each lot has coordinates, zoning, ownership, optional rental, optional improvements, property tax, and natural endowments (per PRD §8.2 — endowments are the only zero-input economic class).

subdivision_id.description: Foreign key to country.territory.subdivisions[].id — the most-granular subdivision containing this lot.

parent_district_id.description: Convenience foreign key to the immediate-parent district (denormalized for query performance).

boundary_geojson.description: Optional GeoJSON polygon defining the lot boundary. For abstract worlds, may be null.

maps_provider_ref.description: Reference to the upstream maps provider object this lot resolves to. v0.2.0 — added per DECISION-WORLD-SHAPE.md §4 + maps-integration CEO plan. null for fully-abstract worlds (no real-maps anchor); otherwise carries the provider id (Nominatim OSM at V0; Mapbox/Google as paid swap-ins later via the same provider enum extension).

provider.description: V0: nominatim_osm (production), mapbox (local-dev only), user_pinned. Future bumps add google_maps.

osm_type.description: Provider-specific feature type. For nominatim_osm: node/way/relation. For mapbox: 'mapbox_feature' sentinel (synthesized because Mapbox doesn't expose OSM ids). null for user_pinned.

osm_id.description: OSM feature id. null for user_pinned.

snapshot.description: Snapshot of upstream fields at capture time (display_name, address components, importance score). Opaque shape; substrate doesn't validate the inner fields.

captured_at.description: When this snapshot was fetched from upstream. Drives staleness detection (F3: warn at >90d, error at >180d).

tombstoned.description: true if upstream OSM entity has been deleted/merged. Anchor-owning readers must surface for user re-pick; narrative readers default-filter.

aliases.description: Alternative names for this lot extracted from OSM namedetails (alt_name, short_name, name:cy, etc.) or user-supplied. Used by safety/output-NER allowlist to accept LLM mentions of 'Big Ben' vs 'Elizabeth Tower' as the same entity. v0.2.0 added per maps-integration CEO plan (eng-review C2).

size_sqm.description: Lot footprint in square meters. Capacity-bounding for production processes (per PRD §8.7 'a 50m² garage cannot output 10,000 cars/month').

zoning_authority_id.description: Foreign key to the institution / subdivision controlling zoning at this lot. Subdivisions with has_own_government can rezone; otherwise country-level zoning_authority applies.

base_price_pol.description: Initial price set by deterministic pricing engine (per PRD §7.4: population density × GDP-equivalent × local-feature-density × country-stratum × random seed).

current_price_pol.description: Current market price. Substrate-tracked, not authored.

ownership.description: Current ownership. May be character, institution, or unowned (e.g. public land).

owner_type.description: polis_sovereign is the default at world creation per DECISION-OWNERSHIP-DEFAULT.md (11th locked decision). Lots are owned by Polis until acquired via commerce, grant, or transfer.

rental.description: Optional active rental contract. Null if owner-occupied or vacant.

improvements.description: Built structures + upgrades on the lot (e.g. 'luxury_finish_v2', 'rooftop_garden', 'blast_furnace', 'stadium_capacity_18400'). Drive zoning-conforming production capacity.

property_tax_pol_per_year.description: Annual property tax owed to country / subdivision treasury. Computed from current_price_pol × applicable_property_tax_rate (country.taxation.property_tax_rate × subdivision adders if applicable). Substrate-computed, but authoring may override for known lots.

endowments.description: Per PRD §8.2 — natural endowments. The only zero-input economic class. Seeded by world generator from real-Earth data (USGS / soil maps / climate / hydrology) for default worlds, or authored for fictional worlds. Players cannot edit; can only discover/deplete/transform.

intensity.description: 0-1 scale. Decays with extraction; over-extraction collapses the field.

discovered.description: False if undiscovered (requires exploration profession to unlock).

infrastructure.description: Substrate-level infrastructure access (set by subdivision / country).

occupancy.description: Who's currently at this lot. Substrate-tracked for character location.

current_institution_id.description: Institution that operates from this lot (e.g. Cattlemarket Park is Hartwell FC's headquarters).
